name: erpipe
description: ERPipe — MCP for Odoo (open-core TypeScript monorepo)
author: Lê Anh Tuấn <justin.le.1105@gmail.com>

scripts.build: npm run build -w @erpipe/odoo-xmlrpc && npm run build -w @erpipe/core && npm run build -w @erpipe/worker-selfhost
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @erpipe/odoo-xmlrpc && npm run typecheck -w @erpipe/core && npm run typecheck -w @erpipe/worker-selfhost
scripts.parity:ts: npm run build -w @erpipe/core && PARITY_TS_ONLY=1 node scripts/parity-harness.mjs
